changelog:
### 🐛 Bug Fixes\n- Fixed AccessibilityService compilation errors: missing onInterrupt() and createWindowManager()

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 99 |
